message:
feat(journal,core,ondisk): add fast-commit corpus tests, refactor read_dir, and extend ext4/btrfs ondisk

Fast-commit test corpus:
- Add ext4_fast_commit_corpus.rs with two fixture-driven integration
  tests: clean replay oracle matching and missing-tail fallback
- Add golden JSON fixtures for clean replay (3 operations: inode
  update, add range, create) and truncated-tail fallback scenario
- Document fixture strategy in tests/fixtures/README.md

Core API:
- Refactor read_dir() signature to remove RequestScope parameter,
  simplifying the directory reading interface

Ondisk/ext4:
- Extend ext4 and btrfs ondisk parsing support
- Update journal Cargo.toml dependencies

Issue tracking:
- Update beads with fast-commit and tree-log implementation progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,9 +24,10 @@ pub use ext4::{
     Ext4Extent, Ext4ExtentHeader, Ext4ExtentIndex, Ext4FileType, Ext4GroupDesc, Ext4ImageReader,
     Ext4IncompatFeatures, Ext4Inode, Ext4RoCompatFeatures, Ext4Superblock, Ext4Xattr, ExtentTree,
     FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, compute_bitmap_checksum, dx_hash, ext4_chksum,

-    verify_bitmap_checksum, verify_dir_block_checksum, verify_extent_block_checksum,
-    verify_group_desc_checksum, verify_inode_checksum,
+    iter_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block_casefold, parse_dir_block,
+    parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree, parse_ibody_xattrs, parse_inode_extent_tree,
+    parse_xattr_block, stamp_block_bitmap_checksum, stamp_dir_block_checksum,
+    stamp_extent_block_checksum, stamp_inode_bitmap_checksum, verify_bitmap_checksum,
+    verify_dir_block_checksum, verify_extent_block_checksum, verify_group_desc_checksum,
+    verify_inode_checksum,
 };

@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ tests/fixtures/
 │   └── btrfs_large.img      # 1024 MiB
 ├── golden/                  # Expected outputs (committed)
 │   ├── ext4_*.json          # ffs inspect output
+│   ├── ext4_fast_commit_*.json # Fast-commit corpus oracles for replay tests
 │   ├── btrfs_*.json         # ffs inspect output
 │   ├── checksums.txt        # SHA-256 verification
 │   └── *.log                # Generation logs
@@ -36,6 +37,11 @@ This script:
 4. Generates golden JSON outputs using `ffs inspect`
 5. Creates SHA-256 checksums for verification
 
+Fast-commit replay corpus fixtures are committed as text JSON under
+`tests/fixtures/golden/ext4_fast_commit_*.json`. They are small, deterministic
+tag-stream oracles used by `ffs-journal` integration tests and do not rely on
+large `.img` artifacts.
+
 ### btrfs
 
 ```bash

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+{
+  "scenario_id": "ext4_fast_commit_clean_replay",
+  "description": "Committed fast-commit tag stream with HEAD, INODE, ADD_RANGE, CREAT, and TAIL tags.",
+  "fast_commit_hex": "0a00100000000000000000000000000000000000070004002a000000030010002a000000640000000a0000008813000005000f00020000000b000000050068656c6c6f090008000700000000000000",
+  "expected": {
+    "transactions_found": 1,
+    "last_tid": 7,
+    "blocks_scanned": 1,
+    "incomplete_transactions": 0,
+    "fallback_required": false,
+    "operations": [
+      {
+        "kind": "inode_update",
+        "ino": 42
+      },
+      {
+        "kind": "add_range",
+        "ino": 42,
+        "logical_block": 100,
+        "len": 10,
+        "physical_block": 5000
+      },
+      {
+        "kind": "create",
+        "parent_ino": 2,
+        "ino": 11,
+        "name": "hello"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+{
+  "scenario_id": "ext4_fast_commit_fallback_missing_tail",
+  "description": "Committed-looking fast-commit tag stream truncated before TAIL; parser must discard pending operations and force fallback to full journal replay.",
+  "fast_commit_hex": "0a00100000000000000000000000000000000000070004002a000000030010002a000000640000000a0000008813000005000f00020000000b000000050068656c6c6f",
+  "expected": {
+    "transactions_found": 0,
+    "last_tid": 0,
+    "blocks_scanned": 1,
+    "incomplete_transactions": 1,
+    "fallback_required": true,
+    "operations": []
+  }
+}
